use_cases: Displaying animated weather conditions in dashboard widgets
Enhancing weather app UIs with smooth looping icon animations
Adding visual weather context to scheduling or planning interfaces
Creating engaging animated weather representations in climate apps
Implementing animated weather status indicators in SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A set of animated weather icon components (Sun, Moon, Cloud) with continuous looping animations built using Framer Motion. The Sun icon features rotating rays with pulsing opacity and a scaling core, while the Moon includes twinkling star effects. Designed as atomic, reusable icon components suitable for weather apps, dashboards, or any interface requiring animated weather visual indicators.
